enemyProfile.notes: High-volume organic enemies. Crowd control and area denial are effective. Chargers and Bile Titans require anti-armor solutions.
Mechanical enemies with heavy armor. Anti-armor weapons essential. Eagles and Orbitals highly effective. Tanks and Hulks require dedicated anti-tank solutions.

Mixed faction. Voteless are unarmored melee hordes — anti-swarm, fire (instant-kill), gas, area-denial. Overseers are shielded medium elites — explosive damage bypasses the shield, headshots one-shot. Harvesters are heavy (AV4) with regenerating shields — anti-tank for the eye/hip joints. Warp Ships (spawners) and Lightning Spires are destroyed by explosives, especially grenades. Watchers call reinforcements — kill on sight (precision). Defensively the faction deals arc damage (Harvester, Watcher, instant-kill Lightning Spire), so arc-resist armor is valuable — but energy WEAPONS are not a counter.

boosters.name: Stamina Enhancement
boosters.effect: Increases all Helldivers' stamina capacity and recovery.

boosters.name: Hellpod Space Optimization
boosters.effect: Helldivers come out of the Hellpod fully stocked on Ammo, Grenades and Stims.

boosters.name: Vitality Enhancement
boosters.effect: Provides minor damage reduction from all sources for all Helldivers.

boosters.name: UAV Recon Booster
boosters.effect: Increases all Helldivers' effective radar range.

boosters.name: Muscle Enhancement
boosters.effect: Allows Helldivers to traverse difficult terrain with ease.

boosters.name: Increased Reinforcement Budget
boosters.effect: Increases the number of available reinforcements.

boosters.name: Flexible Reinforcement Budget
boosters.effect: Reduces time until new reinforcements are granted once they've been depleted.

boosters.name: Localization Confusion
boosters.effect: Increases the time between enemy encounters.

boosters.name: Expert Extraction Pilot
boosters.effect: Lowers the time it takes for the extraction shuttle to reach the extraction beacon.

boosters.name: Motivational Shocks
boosters.effect: Allows faster recovery from slow-inducing attacks, excluding area effects.

boosters.name: Experimental Infusion
boosters.effect: Stims temporarily increase movement speed and damage reduction.

boosters.name: Firebomb Hellpods
boosters.effect: Lines all Hellpods with volatile incendiaries that detonate upon impact.

boosters.name: Dead Sprint
boosters.effect: Allows Helldivers to keep sprinting even when out of stamina, draining health instead.

boosters.name: Armed Resupply Pods
boosters.effect: Mounts a modified AR-23 Liberator to all resupply pods, allowing them to double as automatic turrets.

boosters.name: Sample Extricator
boosters.effect: Large enemies now have a chance of dropping Samples on death.

boosters.name: Sample Scanner
boosters.effect: Gives you a 15% chance to receive twice the Samples on sample pick up.

boosters.name: Stun Pods
boosters.effect: Exposes Hellpod wiring upon surface contact, stunning any units in the vicinity.

boosters.name: Concealed Insertion
boosters.effect: Equips Hellpods to deploy smokescreens on impact, obscuring Helldiver deployment.
